headline: ₹100-300 Cr at risk (routine quarterly profit range for large cap power utility) — JSW Energy posts 93% EBITDA growth in Q1 FY26, signaling robust operational performance
what_matters: BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks apply, but no new disclosure or penalty risk triggered.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is not elevated.
No immediate impact on cost of capital; green financing potential unchanged.
